const tenantId: string = 'tenant_acme_corp'
const id: string = 'post_000123'
const mediaAsset: FeedPostMediaItemAsset = { url: 'https://cdn.acme.com/assets/launch.jpg', mimeType: 'image/jpeg' } as FeedPostMediaItemAsset
const mediaItem: FeedPostMediaItem = { asset: mediaAsset, caption: 'Launch hero image' } as FeedPostMediaItem
const feedPost: FeedPost = { title: 'Product Launch', content: 'We launch May 1 with expanded features.', mediaItems: [mediaItem], links: [{ url: 'https://acme.com/launch', text: 'Launch details' }] } as FeedPost
const result: FlagCommentPublic200Response = await updateFeedPost(tenantId, id, feedPost)
